title: Route A — blind external validation of the frozen commit-gate vs Zhu 2025 genome-scale Perturb-seq (primary human CD4+ T cells)

gate_under_test.rule: default-deny GO iff leakage_audit_passed AND genetic_association>=0.20 AND trust_score>=0.50 AND celltype_matched_eqtl AND eqtl_direction_consistent is not False
gate_under_test.universe: 98 curated T1D/immune genes (handoff/axis3_eqtl_nsig.json); GA=OpenTargets t1d, celltype_matched_eqtl=(eqtl_nsig>0)
gate_under_test.committed_split: 49 GO / 49 WITHHELD (reproduced via CommitGate.evaluate; genetic floor passes for all 98 -> GO<=>eQTL present)

external_truth.dataset: Zhu, Dann, ... Pritchard, Marson (2025), Genome-scale Perturb-seq in primary human CD4+ T cells, bioRxiv 2025.12.23.696273, doi 10.64898/2025.12.23.696273
external_truth.source_on_disk: data/raw/GWCD4i.DE_stats.h5ad (16.79GB, CZI VCP S3 s3://genome-scale-tcell-perturb-seq/marson2025_data/, MIT, byte-verified)
external_truth.effect_field: obs.n_total_de_genes = number of downstream DE genes per (perturbed target x culture_condition); authors' own per-perturbation transcriptional-effect summary

hypothesis: GATE GO calls (eQTL+genetics-anchored credible T1D CD4 T-cell targets) correspond to LARGER real transcriptional effects in Zhu than WITHHELD calls; WITHHELD are the weaker/no-effect ones.

metrics.PRIMARY: AUROC of Zhu effect magnitude (score = log1p(de_max), n_total_de_genes max across conditions) separating GO(pos) vs WITHHELD(neg); = P(GO effect > WITHHELD effect). 10000-resample bootstrap 95% CI.
metrics.SECONDARY_MCC: MCC of binary gate-call (GO=1) vs binary 'real transcriptional effect' = de_max >= 10 DE genes (gate-blind, round threshold; genome-wide 75th pct is 8).
metrics.context_split: PRIMARY AUROC recomputed separately for Rest and for Stim(max of 8hr/48hr).

success_criterion.POSITIVE_yes: AUROC point>0.5 AND bootstrap95 lower bound>0.5 AND MCC>0.2
success_criterion.PARTIAL: AUROC point>0.55 but CI includes 0.5, OR only one context (rest|stim) separates
success_criterion.NEGATIVE_or_OOD_FAILURE_no: AUROC point<=0.55 with CI spanning 0.5 AND MCC<=0.2 -> frozen gate calls do NOT track transcriptional effect OOD; report plainly (prior: Marson->Norman transfer FAILED, recalibration was needed)

honesty_notes: Metric+criterion fixed a priori (standard AUROC/MCC, conventional CI>0.5 bound); nothing tunable. A group-mean descriptive of de_max was seen during table assembly and already suggests a null — this is therefore a CONFIRMATORY pre-registration of an anticipated OOD-null, direction not tuned. No fabricated/simulated data. Committed gate scored, not a surrogate.
